subject: docs(claude): replace Triggers with glow-props cross-fleet version
body:
Replaced the legacy 10-row single-word trigger table
(review/audit/docs/mobile/clean/performance/security/debug/improve/start)
with the glow-props cross-fleet version: 48 triggers across 8 groups
(correctness, trust, speed, frontend, quality, ops, design, fleet),
6 cadence meta sweeps (hot, quick, ship, session, tidy, all), and
7 reflective passes (risk, surface, wrap, skipped, assumed, approach,
cold). Includes scope modifiers (branch / staged / file <path>) and
behavior rules carried over from glow-props.

Added one line in AI Notes noting trigger-vs-repo-convention name
collisions for `docs`, `config`, `state`, `api`, `pwa`, `patterns`
with a precedence rule: treat bare words as triggers only in a
review/audit context, otherwise as the repo concept.

Tags: documentation, fleet-alignment, triggers
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
title: replace Triggers with glow-props cross-fleet version
